title: Why Carnival, Norwegian, and Royal Caribbean Stocks Bounced Back Today
text: The CDC removes its cruise warning and cruise investors cheer.

title: CDC lifts travel warning for the cruise industry two years into pandemic
text: The CDC lifted its travel warning for cruises on Wednesday after two years of shifting advisories, lawsuits, and criticism from industry leaders who accused the agency of heavy-handed regulations.

title: One Way or Another Carnival Cruise Lines Should Be a Compelling Buy
text: Carnival is expected to deliver revenue of $2.3 billion when it reports earnings. That's less than half of its pre-pandemic revenue, and a reminder that it may still be several quarters before CCL stock is firing on all cylinders

title: Buying Norwegian Cruise Lines Stock Is Still a Game For Speculators
text: Norwegian Cruise Lines stock could come roaring back if peace breaks out and Covid-19 recedes. Speculators have been winning on NCLH stock ever since the pandemic bottomed, and their hopes are higher than ever.

title: Why Carnival, Royal Caribbean, and Norwegian Cruise Stocks All Popped Today
text: Oil prices continue to retrace toward year-long averages (but they're not there yet).

title: Why Royal Caribbean, Norwegian Cruise, and Carnival Stocks Sailed Higher Today
text: Investors cheered as oil prices went down for a change.

title: What's Happening With Norwegian Cruise Line Stock?
text: Norwegian Cruise Line, the third-largest cruise line operator, has seen its stock price decline by about 21% over the last week, underperforming the S&P 500, which was down by about 4% over the same period. The stock also remains down by about 25% over the last month.

title: Why Cruise Line Stocks Plunged Today
text: Rising oil prices are a double headwind for cruise lines.

title: Cruise Stocks Alert: Why Are RCL, CCL, NCLH Stocks Stumbling Today?
text: Cruise stocks are falling across the board as the Russia-Ukraine conflict poses new constraints. Here's what investors need to know.

title: Why Norwegian Cruise, Carnival, and Royal Caribbean Stocks Cratered Today
text: Conflict between Russia and Ukraine is turning cruise line stocks into collateral damage.

title: Why Norwegian Cruise Line Is a Buy Despite Delayed Profitability
text: The cruise line operator now says it will only become profitable on an adjusted basis this year.
